rows.description: Domus Fund payment on aut of
rows.notes: Selected 'gemini-flash' description ('Domus Fund payment on aut of') as it is more accurate to the visual ledger than 'claude-haiku's 'Dormus Fund Payment on act of'. Both correctly identified no amounts.
This row was correctly identified by 'gemini-flash'. 'claude-haiku' entirely missed this row. Values '2045 2 2' are clear upon visual verification.

Selected 'gemini-flash' for both description and amounts. Visual verification confirms the description 'Candy from Dec 21 to Jan 31 19.3' and a '1/2' fraction mark in the pence column. 'claude-haiku' provided an incorrect description and hallucinated amounts '20.4.2' which are not present in the ledger for this row.

Selected 'gemini-flash' for amounts and a refined description based on visual verification. Image clearly shows '1.1.8' for pounds, shillings, and pence. 'claude-haiku' had a significantly different description ('Coals from Feb 16 March 25 1 7 8') and incorrect amounts ('1.18.4'). The '1.1.8' visible in the original ledger's description column for this entry is the embedded amount, which is correctly extracted to the dedicated amount fields.

Selected 'gemini-flash'. Visual verification confirms a dash for pounds, '18' shillings, '11' pence, and a '1/2' fraction. 'claude-haiku' incorrectly read pounds as '1' and pence as '4', and missed the fraction.

Both extractors correctly identified the amounts as '13s 13d', and recognized the pence value (13) exceeds the valid range (per 'gemini-flash's note). 'gemini-flash's description 'Colley Garden' is slightly more accurate than 'claude-haiku's 'Colley's Garden'.

Both shilling (21) and pence (29) values exceed valid ranges as correctly noted by 'gemini-flash'.
